name: Elevate
assessment: Elevate is a Bit from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Documented height: 2mm. Debuted with LeonClaw 0-80E in Random Booster Vol. 5. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Under Flat
assessment: Under Flat is a Bit from the Beyblade X Unique Line. Debuted with SharkScale 4-50UF. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Turbo
assessment: Turbo is a Ratchet-Integrated Bit from the Beyblade X Custom Line. Debuted with PegasusBlast ATr. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Operate
assessment: Operate is a Balance type Ratchet-Integrated Bit from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It combines Ratchet and Bit into one part and can switch between Attack Mode (wide hole flat tip) and Defense Mode (small ball tip). Debuted with EmperorMight HOp. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Low Orbital
assessment: Low Orbital is a Stamina type Bit from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It is a lower variant of the Orbital Bit, sitting 1mm lower for improved stability and endurance. Debuted with SamuraiSaber 9-65LO in Random Booster Vol. 10. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Wall
assessment: Wall is a Defense type Bit from the Beyblade X Custom Line. It features a wide wall around the tip to reduce tilting. Debuted with PerseusDark B6-80W. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.
